title: Build shared telemetry runtime
summary: Add the reusable-core telemetry runtime, configuration resolution, sink management, and fail-open guard.
scope_items: Create watchtower_core.telemetry with config, run context, and nested operations.
Implement JSONL sink writing and stderr summary support with fail-open disablement.
Keep the runtime backend-neutral and standard-library-only.
done_when_items: A reusable-core telemetry package exists and is covered by unit tests.
Telemetry can be enabled, disabled, or redirected by environment variables.
